## AbstractQuery.countDocuments() method

Returns the documents count that matches the search query

**Signature:**

```typescript
countDocuments(query?: QueryRootFilter, options?: QueryCountDocumentsOptions): this;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

</th></tr></thead>

query

</td><td>

_(Optional)_ Search query


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

options


</td><td>

[QueryCountDocumentsOptions](./iodm-query.querycountdocumentsoptions.md)


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ Query options


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

this


## Example


```ts
const query = new Query(idb, "store-name");
const count = await query.countDocuments(
 query,
 options
);
```
